config.name: 12.1-reaper
config.description: Step 12.1 floor-fix bench — Reaper (post-edit) vs Reaper-prefloor (pre-edit) on hollow-disruption. 40 games cross-pair (no mirror, no self). Post-edit Reaper passes if it wins >=55% of decisive games. Same tournament harness + caps as 12.0 baseline: 6000 inputs, 150000 events, logLevel=llm.

notes: Close race: 'ReapOld' edges out runner-up by 18 points — consider more games per matchup.
1 matchup(s) drew ≥ 40% of games — worth inspecting for stall states.

learningLog: Tournament '12.1-reaper' ran 40 games across 1 matchup(s). Pairs: ReapNew=(deck:hollow-disruption,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-reaper), ReapOld=(deck:hollow-disruption,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-reaper-prefloor)

Matchup ReapNew vs ReapOld: deck 'hollow-disruption' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-reaper' versus deck 'hollow-disruption' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-reaper-prefloor'. ReapOld won 11/40 (AWins:4,Draws:25, A side 10%). Same deck, different bots: 'experimental/2026-04-19-reaper-prefloor' pilots 'hollow-disruption' better than 'experimental/2026-04-19-reaper' in decisive games (15 of 40). Treat as evidence of pilot skill on this deck. Average game length: 303 steps.

Across all matchups, 'ReapOld' (deck:hollow-disruption,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-reaper-prefloor) outperformed 'ReapNew' (deck:hollow-disruption,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-reaper). Pattern: the top pair's bot profile is worth studying as a candidate to pair with similar decks; the weakest pair suggests either a weight-table mismatch or a deck that disagrees with the bot's scoring priorities.
Observation: Close race: 'ReapOld' edges out runner-up by 18 points — consider more games per matchup.
Observation: 1 matchup(s) drew ≥ 40% of games — worth inspecting for stall states.

LEARNING HINT: When choosing a bot for a new deck, prefer profiles whose matched decks in this tournament share archetype tags (aggro/control/midrange) with the new deck. Avoid pairing a utility bot tuned for defence with an aggro deck — it will underweight tempo plays.
